description: Write a publication-quality matplotlib .mplstyle template (fonts, hidden top/right spines, tick sizing, Okabe-Ito color cycle, savefig DPI) via create_style_template().
rules: read-only with respect to inputs; only writes under record_store
takes no input vars — the preset content is fixed (the base publication style)
the emitted file is usable directly with plt.style.use()
degrades gracefully (writes a non-empty manifest, exits 0) when matplotlib is absent
usage: No vars required. Output: publication.mplstyle (the style file) plus style_template.json manifest.
limitation: Emits only the single base publication preset; journal-specific overrides are applied at runtime via configure_for_journal, not baked into the file.
